summary: Added mark_scheme_text foreign top-level question label detection to the current output-integrity audit.

files_changed.why: Added mark_scheme_text_foreign_question_label failures, counts, check status, and conservative line-label parsing.
Added a contaminated q10 fixture plus a legitimate long q7/formula control.

test_results: Initial test failed as expected because the text-label check did not exist.
Live audit exited 1 and reported mark_scheme_text_foreign_question_label_record_count=25 and suspicious_rendered_crop_dimension_count=30.
repo_hygiene_notes: No canonical JSON or image assets were intentionally rewritten.
Live audit report was written under the run folder.
known_risks: The first live audit found a false-positive style label, 90 (x), which should be filtered by known paper question numbers in the next iteration.
